title: GitKraken Student Developer Pack Offer
description: GitKraken Desktop is the most popular Git client for Windows, Mac & Linux, offering both a GUI and terminal interface. Deep integration with GitHub repos and issues enable interactive pull request management and issue management directly in the client.
eligibility: Verified students aged 13 or older who are approved for the GitHub Student Developer Pack; provider restrictions may also apply.
value: The GitKraken Student Plan: Free for 6 months and then up to 80% off the Pro price as long as you’re a student.
